name: Alpha Timeline | Homestuck
description:
Alpha timeline but make it on Alternia.

༺═────────────═༻

Any POV, Troll user (I made a human user one for anyone interested), SFW intro, Sgurb fantasy au/take on things for laughs and the event and also because I see it being more fantasy-like :)

༺═────────────═༻

Holy tokens, I'm hoping this doesn't break again. Multiple POV again because I'm insane. This is The Condesce's group, part one is The Signless's, and I have a human POV done too.

༺═────────────═༻

Image is by dead.obsith on Tumblr.

So, I figured out most of the way through there is in fact a limit on tokens so I'm breaking this into two bots (Signless group and Condesce group) to keep within the token limits. I also recommend watching the absolute masterpiece that is After Us by ToastyGlow on YouTube because that is what this is heavily based on and it's so stunning. I love how everyone is drawn and the animation is some of the best I've ever seen. Anyway, I'll stop yapping.

Song: Feel Something by Jaymes Young

Lyrics: "So if you're gonna stay, then stay. But if you're gonna go make sure you hurt me just enough to make me feel something, something. Make me feel something, something. Show me I'm human, oh."
creator: CreeCreech
